Workspace for Connected Document Workflow

A full-featured, client-side workspace for connected document workflows: annotate, redact, draw, edit text, insert images, crop pages, and export, entirely in your browser.

Workspace is the flagship of SARVARC, which also includes 29+ free file conversion tools across PDF, Spreadsheet, Image, Video, Data & Text.

Dashboard: Smart PDF Upload, AI Image Extraction, Image Editor, Smart Crop Studio, and Export Center, all in one place.

About

What is SARVARC Workspace?

SARVARC Workspace is two things in one: a full-featured, client-side Workspace for connected document workflows, including annotate, redact, draw, edit text, insert images, crop pages, and export PDFs, plus a browser-based suite of 29+ file conversion and text tools across 6 categories. All running locally on your device. No installation, no account, no waiting.

Most conversion tools support both file upload and direct paste, so you can go from raw text or data to a finished file in seconds, while Workspace handles the deeper, multi-step document editing.

Features

Everything in one place

01
100% Private
Files never leave your browser. Every conversion runs client-side using JavaScript and browser APIs, with no server, no cloud, and no data retention of any kind.
02
No Account Needed
Open the tool and start converting immediately. No sign-up, no subscription, no paywalls, ever.
03
Smart Text → Excel
Auto-detects delimiters (comma, tab, pipe, semicolon), identifies column types (numbers, dates, emails), shows a live preview, and exports a clean .xlsx, no manual formatting.
04
Paste-to-Convert
No file needed for most tools. Paste raw text, CSV, JSON, XML, or HTML directly into the tool and convert in one click.
05
Split PDF: 3 Modes
Split by page ranges, every N pages, or hand-pick pages from a visual thumbnail grid. Single extractions download as PDF; multi-part splits come as a ZIP.
06
Real PDF Compression
Genuinely shrinks PDFs by recompressing embedded images at your chosen quality. Measurable before/after size savings, not a placeholder.
07
Trim Video
Drag handles on a visual timeline to set start and end points, preview the clip live, then export, re-encoded entirely in your browser, no upload required.
08
Extract Audio
Pull the audio track from any video and save as WAV (lossless) or WebM/Opus (compressed). Uses the Web Audio API, no server, no upload.
09
Batch & ZIP Output
Multi-output operations, such as PDF to images, GIF/WebP frame extraction, and video frame capture, are automatically bundled into a single ZIP download.
10
Works Offline
Once the page loads, most conversions work without an internet connection, ideal for restricted environments, travel, or low-bandwidth setups.
11
Dark & Light Mode
Switch themes instantly with one click. Your preference is remembered across the tool and landing page.
12
Merge PDF
Combine two or more PDFs into one. Reorder files exactly how you want before merging, all done locally, with no file size cap.
13
Case Converter NEW
Instantly switch text between 10 case formats: UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case, kebab-case, CONSTANT_CASE, aLtErNaTiNg, and Inverse Case. Try it →
14
Bulk Image Compressor NEW
Compress JPG, PNG, WebP, and SVG images in bulk. Adjust quality, resize by max dimension or set a target file size, and download everything as a single ZIP, no upload, 100% in your browser. Try it →

Privacy

Your files stay yours

Local Processing
Every conversion runs inside your browser tab using JavaScript and browser APIs. Nothing is ever sent to a server.
No Storage
We do not store, log, or retain any files you process. Close the tab and everything is gone, with no trace left behind.
No File Size Limits
No server-side caps. Your device's memory is the only constraint, so most everyday files convert instantly.

Privacy Policy

Last Updated: June 20, 2026

Welcome to SARVARC Workspace. Your privacy is important to us. This Privacy Policy explains how SARVARC Workspace collects, uses, and protects information when you use our website and services.

1. Who We Are

SARVARC Workspace is a browser-based productivity platform that provides file conversion and workspace tools.

Contact Email: sarvarcworkspace@gmail.com

2. Information We Collect

SARVARC Workspace may collect limited information necessary for operating and improving the website, including:

  • Browser type and version
  • Device information
  • Operating system information
  • Anonymous usage statistics
  • Error and performance logs

We do not intentionally collect personal information unless you voluntarily contact us.

3. File Processing

SARVARC Workspace is designed to process files locally within your browser whenever possible.

Files processed through SARVARC Workspace tools are not stored on our servers unless explicitly stated for a specific feature.

Users are responsible for the files they choose to process using SARVARC Workspace.

4. Analytics

We may use analytics tools to understand:

  • Website traffic
  • Tool usage
  • User engagement
  • Technical issues

Analytics information is generally collected in aggregated form and is used solely to improve SARVARC Workspace.

5. Cookies

SARVARC Workspace may use cookies and similar technologies to:

  • Improve website functionality
  • Remember user preferences
  • Analyze website performance

You may disable cookies through your browser settings.

6. Third-Party Services

SARVARC Workspace may rely on third-party providers for:

  • Website hosting
  • Analytics
  • Domain management
  • Payment processing

These providers maintain their own privacy policies.

7. Data Security

We take reasonable measures to protect information and maintain website security. However, no internet-based service can guarantee absolute security.

8. Children's Privacy

SARVARC Workspace is not intended for children under 13 years of age.

9. Changes to This Privacy Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date.

10. Contact

For questions regarding this Privacy Policy, please contact:

Email: sarvarcworkspace@gmail.com

Terms & Conditions

Last Updated: June 20, 2026

By accessing or using SARVARC Workspace, you agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions.

1. Acceptance of Terms

By using SARVARC Workspace, you agree to comply with these Terms & Conditions. If you do not agree, please discontinue use of the website.

2. Services

SARVARC Workspace provides browser-based file conversion and productivity tools.

We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any feature without prior notice.

3. User Responsibilities

You agree not to:

  • Use SARVARC Workspace for unlawful purposes
  • Process illegal content
  • Attempt to interfere with website operations
  • Circumvent security measures
  • Violate intellectual property rights

You remain solely responsible for any files or content you process.

4. Intellectual Property

The SARVARC Workspace name, branding, website design, software, content, and associated materials are owned by SARVARC Workspace and protected by applicable intellectual property laws.

5. No Warranty

SARVARC Workspace is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis.

We make no warranties regarding:

  • Service availability
  • Conversion accuracy
  • Reliability
  • Fitness for a particular purpose

6. Limitation of Liability

SARVARC Workspace shall not be liable for:

  • Data loss
  • Conversion errors
  • Business interruption
  • Indirect damages
  • Consequential damages

Use of SARVARC Workspace is at your own risk.

7. Third-Party Services

Certain functionality may rely on third-party services. SARVARC Workspace is not responsible for third-party content, policies, or availability.

8. Termination

We reserve the right to suspend or terminate access to SARVARC Workspace for any reason, including misuse of the service.

9. Changes to Terms

SARVARC Workspace may revise these Terms & Conditions at any time. Continued use of the website constitutes acceptance of updated Terms.

10. Governing Law

These Terms shall be governed by and interpreted in accordance with the laws of India.

11. Contact

For questions regarding these Terms & Conditions:

Email: sarvarcworkspace@gmail.com
